Golden scrub policy (lw-pzj.10.4, lw-pzj.7.1)
--------------------------------------------
This fixture uses fixed source_id/message_id strings so the ltn-rx-* block id
suffix is stable (SHA-256 prefix over "source\\nmessage"). The H2 repeats that
id as an Obsidian ``^block`` anchor for back-links. Summary holds governance
tuple + effective-count table; Provenance carries deterministic SHA-256
fingerprints plus optional ``last_ledger_event_id`` / ``last_ingested_at`` (ISO
strings). Timeline is placeholder until ledger projection lands. For golden
diffs, scrub volatile ISO timestamps if fixtures ever adopt live clocks;
fingerprints here are fixed from canonical inputs.
